traybakes.main > section:nth-of-type(2) > div > di: Traybakes are perfect for smaller birthdays, party bags and tea-room counters — and we'll personalise them with a message for £5. Choose from a wide range of sponge flavours, buttercreams and toppings, alongside our classics: millionaire's shortbread, flapjack, old-school sprinkle cake, rocky road, tiffin, brownies and blondies are just a few of the tray bakes we can make.
